# GitHub Labels — MyBoss360

This file documents all labels used in the MyBoss360 GitHub repository. Use `scripts/create-labels.sh` to provision these labels on a fresh repository.

---

## Type Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `feature` | `#0075ca` | New capability or enhancement |
| `bug` | `#d73a4a` | Confirmed defect or regression |
| `task` | `#e4e669` | Infrastructure, refactor, or tooling work |
| `epic` | `#0052cc` | Large body of work spanning multiple issues |
| `research` | `#c5def5` | Time-boxed investigation / spike |
| `documentation` | `#0075ca` | Documentation only |
| `security` | `#b60205` | Security vulnerability or hardening |
| `chore` | `#ededed` | Dependency updates, housekeeping |
| `test` | `#bfd4f2` | Test additions or fixes only |
| `release` | `#0e8a16` | Release preparation or changelog |

---

## Domain Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `ai` | `#7B68EE` | AI assistant, providers, or inference |
| `knowledge` | `#8B4513` | Knowledge Engine, documents, chunking |
| `calendar` | `#1a73e8` | Google Calendar integration |
| `gmail` | `#ea4335` | Google Gmail integration |
| `contacts` | `#34a853` | Google Contacts integration |
| `drive` | `#fbbc04` | Google Drive integration |
| `crm` | `#ff6d00` | CRM (companies, contacts, deals) |
| `automation` | `#ff9900` | Workflow Engine and Automation Builder |
| `approval` | `#f9a825` | Approval Engine |
| `voice` | `#00c853` | Voice assistant, STT, TTS |
| `embeddings` | `#aa00ff` | Vector embeddings |
| `vector-search` | `#6200ea` | pgvector and semantic search |
| `rag` | `#4a148c` | Retrieval-Augmented Generation |
| `agents` | `#1b5e20` | Multi-agent system |
| `onboarding` | `#01579b` | User onboarding flow |
| `auth` | `#880e4f` | Authentication and authorization |
| `database` | `#3e2723` | Schema, migrations, RLS |
| `api` | `#006064` | REST API routes |
| `ui` | `#f3e5f5` | Frontend / UI components |
| `integrations` | `#e8f5e9` | Third-party integrations |

## Priority Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `high-priority` | `#b60205` | Must ship in current sprint |
| `medium-priority` | `#ff9900` | Important, planned for near-term sprint |
| `low-priority` | `#cfd3d7` | Nice-to-have, no hard deadline |

## Workflow Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `good-first-issue` | `#7057ff` | Suitable for new contributors |
| `help-wanted` | `#008672` | Looking for contributors |
| `blocked` | `#d93f0b` | Cannot proceed — depends on unresolved issue |
| `in-progress` | `#0e8a16` | Actively being worked on |
| `needs-review` | `#fbca04` | Awaiting code review |
| `needs-design` | `#c5def5` | Awaiting design input before implementation |
| `on-hold` | `#ededed` | Intentionally paused |
| `wontfix` | `#ffffff` | Will not be fixed or implemented |
| `duplicate` | `#cfd3d7` | Duplicate of an existing issue |
| `invalid` | `#e4e669` | Does not meet issue quality bar |

---

## Special Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `technical-debt` | `#ffd700` | Known code quality issue to be addressed |
| `performance` | `#ff6d00` | Latency, throughput, or resource usage |
| `breaking-change` | `#b60205` | Changes a public API or contract |
| `migration` | `#5319e7` | Requires database migration |
| `infrastructure` | `#006b75` | CI/CD, deployment, hosting changes |
| `compliance` | `#880e4f` | SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA-related work |
| `enterprise` | `#0052cc` | Enterprise-tier feature (SSO, RBAC, audit) |
